document_title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Assurance requirements for delivery of enhancement schemes appendix

key_decisions.detail: Companies must submit enhancement delivery plans with independent third-party assurance for all schemes above a materiality threshold within 6 months of FD publication
PCDs set for enhancement schemes to protect customers — payments clawed back at PR29 if outputs not delivered
Schemes above £200m subject to gating with independent assurance at each gate before funding released
Total enhancement programme of up to £44bn for AMP8, approximately four times the PR19 level

key_numbers.label: Net zero challenge fund
key_numbers.context: Fund to support net zero ambitions

glossary_terms.definition: Price Control Deliverable — mechanism to protect customers if companies do not deliver enhancement outputs; payments clawed back at PR29
Expenditure allowance released in stages subject to companies passing independent assurance gates
Water Industry National Environment Programme — the programme of environmental improvements required by environmental regulators
National Environment Programme — Welsh equivalent of WINEP
